claims.summary: Projection epoch persistence must not depend on the caller's working directory.
claims.disposition: verify env override and executable-relative cache resolution

claims.summary: Missing or interrupted epoch files must resolve deterministically without a random semantic remap.
claims.disposition: verify kernel-derived epoch, checksum, atomic writer, stale temp cleanup, and round-trip tests

claims.summary: CODEC_MAP inspection must remain read-only and must not create the epoch file.
claims.disposition: verify projection runtime readout and no-write behavior
